---
pagetitle: "Software - Thinh Ong"
description: "Open-source R packages and tools by Thinh Ong for infectious disease modelling, biostatistics, and bioinformatics."
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source("../code/software.R")

# Read the package table with a 24h on-disk cache (get_software_sheet lives in
# code/software.R). A fresh cache means no Google auth and no network call
# during a render; a failed fetch falls back to the last cached copy so the
# build never breaks. The cache refreshes on its own once it passes 24h.
cv_sheet <- get_software_sheet(cache = ".software-cache.rds")

cv_sheet$logo <- paste0("../img/software/", cv_sheet$logo)

# expose the package count so other pages (the homepage) can show a consistent,
# auto-updated number without re-fetching the sheet
tryCatch(writeLines(as.character(nrow(cv_sheet)), "../code/.pkg-count"),
         error = function(e) NULL)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
gen_software_table(cv_sheet)
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var root = document.querySelector('.pg');
  if (!root) return;
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  // Count-up for the hero stat numbers
  root.querySelectorAll('.pg-stat-num').forEach(function (el) {
    var to = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-to'), 10) || 0;
    if (reduce) { el.textContent = to; return; }
    var n = 0, step = Math.max(1, Math.round(to / 16));
    el.textContent = '0';
    var t = setInterval(function () { n += step; if (n >= to) { n = to; clearInterval(t); } el.textContent = n; }, 55);
  });

  // Entrance: reveal panels (rows stagger via CSS)
  if (!reduce && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    root.classList.add('anim');
    var reveal = new IntersectionObserver(function (es) {
      es.forEach(function (e) { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('in'); reveal.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12 });
    root.querySelectorAll('.pg-panel').forEach(function (p) { reveal.observe(p); });
  }

  // Contents-nav: keep exactly one item highlighted for the section you are in
  var links = root.querySelectorAll('.pg-toc a');
  var panels = Array.prototype.slice.call(root.querySelectorAll('.pg-panel[id]'));
  function linkFor(id) { for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].hash === '#' + id) return links[i]; } return null; }
  function setActive(link) { links.forEach(function (l) { l.classList.toggle('active', l === link); }); }

  var navLock = false, lockT, ticking = false;
  function syncActive() {
    ticking = false;
    if (navLock || !panels.length) return;
    var line = window.innerHeight * 0.28, current = panels[0];
    panels.forEach(function (p) { if (p.getBoundingClientRect().top <= line) current = p; });
    setActive(linkFor(current.id));
  }
  function onScroll() { if (!ticking) { ticking = true; requestAnimationFrame(syncActive); } }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener('resize', onScroll, { passive: true });
  syncActive();

  // Click highlights immediately; the native anchor jump scrolls the page
  // (it respects each panel's scroll-margin-top). navLock keeps the spy from
  // fighting the highlight until the jump settles.
  links.forEach(function (a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function () {
      navLock = true; setActive(a);
      clearTimeout(lockT);
      lockT = setTimeout(function () { navLock = false; syncActive(); }, reduce ? 0 : 700);
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
